evals.name: kz-regulator-high-score
evals.prompt: Evaluate this source. Input: {"candidate": {"url": "https://afsa.aifc.kz", "type": "website", "name": "AFSA", "language": "en", "country_hint": "KZ", "sample_titles": ["AFSA grants crypto license to XYZ Crypto Ltd", "AFSA publishes updated digital asset regulatory framework", "AFSA fines a crypto provider for compliance breaches"], "sample_content": "The Astana Financial Services Authority today granted a license...", "publication_frequency_per_week": 2, "rss_url": null}}
evals.expected_output: recommended=true, suggested_priority=1, в pros упомянуты регулятор и Казахстан

evals.name: reject-anonymous-pump-channel
evals.prompt: Evaluate this source. Input: {"candidate": {"url": "https://t.me/anon_crypto_alpha", "type": "telegram", "name": "Anon Crypto Alpha", "language": "ru", "country_hint": null, "sample_titles": ["🚀🚀🚀 ЭТО ВЗЛЕТИТ! Сегодня покупаем!", "Инсайд: завтра памп токена X на 200%", "Слили адрес кита, который скупает всё подряд"], "sample_content": "Ребят, инсайд! Сегодня в 19:00 памп...", "publication_frequency_per_week": 50}}
assertions: cons mentions anonymity OR sensationalism OR speculation OR аноним OR спекуляц

evals.name: reputable-crypto-media
evals.prompt: Evaluate this source. Input: {"candidate": {"url": "https://coindesk.com", "type": "rss", "name": "CoinDesk", "language": "en", "country_hint": "US", "sample_titles": ["SEC delays decision on Bitcoin ETF", "Ethereum upgrade postponed to Q3", "Singapore MAS releases stablecoin rules"], "publication_frequency_per_week": 80, "rss_url": "https://coindesk.com/feed"}}
evals.expected_output: recommended=true, score 70+, RSS отмечен в pros
assertions: pros mentions RSS OR mentions high frequency

evals.name: edge-case-empty-sample
evals.prompt: Evaluate this source. Input: {"candidate": {"url": "https://obscure-crypto-blog.com", "type": "website", "name": "Obscure Crypto Blog", "language": "en", "country_hint": null, "sample_titles": [], "publication_frequency_per_week": null}}
evals.expected_output: Низкий confidence из-за пустого sample, рекомендуется собрать вручную
assertions: cons mentions missing sample data OR insufficient information OR sample OR недостат
